hook.text: AMORIM WANTED AS NEXT AC MILAN BOSS

beats.text: UNITED SACKED AMORIM ON JANUARY 5 AFTER POOR FORM
THE 41-YEAR-OLD HAS BEEN OUT OF FOOTBALL SINCE
HE HELD TALKS WITH MILAN IN PORTUGAL LAST WEEK
THE ATHLETIC NAMES HIM AS MILAN'S LEADING CANDIDATE

caption: Five months after Manchester United sacked him, Ruben Amorim is the leading candidate to take charge of AC Milan. The Athletic reports the 41-year-old held talks with the Italian giants in Portugal last week. A fresh chapter — but what do you think of Amorim as Milan boss? 🔴 REPORTED — per The Athletic.
